original_image_tags: hand-drawn sketch of a horizontal line representing the diameter of a disc. Two arrows point to specific positions on the line. Text annotation reads "RELATIVE POSITION OF 2 LIGHTS". The arrows point to the division points between the center segment and the outer segments.

elements.description: A simple hand-drawn diagram depicting a horizontal line with an arrow pointing to it, labeled 'RELATIVE POSITION OF 2 LIGHTS'.
A classification stamp at the top left corner reading 'SECRET (NOFORN)'.
A partially obscured classification stamp at the bottom center of the page.
